Took my mom for denture service, Dr How working after the clinic operation hour just to get the denture mould alignment correct. Very detail and perfectionist person she is. And she is very gentle

Whoever scare to get tooth extraction, do look for Dr.How...she is great to keep you calm & you be surprised - no pain too !!!

reviews.text: Maxwell Platinum Dental is my top choice for dental care. I’m very satisfied with Dr. Shermaine Ho. She is patient, detailed, and professional. I had my dental implant done here and I am confident with both the results and the reasonable pricing. Thank you! 🙏🏻

reviews.name: Evelyn Yap
reviews.text: I went for my dental treatment at Maxcare Platinum Dental last Saturday, 17th January 2026 at 4.30pm for scaling and polishing. Doctor Shermaine was very detailed, patient and gentle. She explained to me on how to brush my teeth correctly and to avoid caffeine. This will lead to staining my teeth. Her service was slow and steady. My gums did not bleed at all this time. Overall satisfied and you should come and try the service here.

title: Primecare Dental Clinic - Paramount PJ
address: 1a, Jln 20/16, Taman Paramount, 46300 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Evangeline Ng
reviews.text:
Very disappointing experience with Dr Manesa. I was told my wisdom tooth extraction would be straightforward and did not require an X-ray, but after 2.5 hours the procedure failed and part of the root was left inside. I was in significant pain throughout, and the dentist did not stop or reassess.

The attitude was also unprofessional, and I was even asked “what do you want now?” instead of being properly advised. A filling done during the same visit was also not properly aligned and had to be corrected at a government clinic.

I experienced prolonged bleeding and had to seek immediate treatment elsewhere, where I was prescribed antibiotics and additional medication. I also sent a formal complaint to the clinic but received no response.

It has been almost two weeks and I am still
on antibiotics and painkillers and waiting to undergo surgery once the swelling and inflammation subside. Overall, a very stressful experience. Please consider getting proper assessment and a second opinion before proceeding here.

reviews.name: Chung Jia Yi
reviews.text: If you want to do scaling, find Dr Eugene, he made sure it was pain free and comfortable, very satisfied.

reviews.name: minnin Han
reviews.text:
I am the mother of a 6-year-old child, and we visited Primecare PJ for an emergency appointment with Dr Elaine after my child had an accident that fractured his front tooth. He was in pain, crying loudly, and extremely scared. As a mother, it was very distressing to see him in that state.

My child was very resistant to treatment at first due to fear. However, Dr Elaine and the staff nurse were incredibly patient and calm. They took the time to comfort him, played a kid-friendly cartoon to distract him, and helped him relax. Within moments, the tooth was removed quickly and smoothly. To my surprise, my child immediately stopped crying and said there was no pain at all.

What I appreciated most was Dr Elaine’s care even after the treatment. She explained the aftercare clearly and asked us to come back for a review with an X-ray. Thanks to her gentle and caring approach, my child is no longer afraid of dental appointments and now only wants to see Dr Elaine.

I am writing this review to sincerely thank Dr Elaine, who is now based at the Kepong branch and has replaced the previous doctor in the PJ branch. We are truly grateful for her professionalism, kindness, and excellent care.

reviews.name: Cheng Kitt CHAN
reviews.text: didn't know wisdom tooth can be so fast and no pain, Had my wisdom tooth removal here with Dr Elaine. Professional, Fast, smooth surgery without any pain. treatment room has tv and music keep me calm throughout the procedures.. my upper wisdom extraction around 5 mins for whole procedure.

reviews.name: wasabi bunny
reviews.text:
I’m Japanese and living in Malaysia for work, clinic is very clean, Dr. has ben replaced with new professioanl Dr.
The not good Dr who was there before seems to be not longer working there now.

I visited clinic yesterday for my wisdom tooth removal under Dr Elaine, professional withgood explanation and after care treatment.
Smooth surgery procedure with minimal pain, took around 30 minutes for the whole procedure. and price is reasonable included xray and free consultation, sure recommended

reviews.name: Jhon Alex
reviews.text: Im from myanmmar. Dr elaine did a very good extraction for me without any pain.  Strongly recommend ❤️❤️

reviews.name: Ivan Chen
reviews.text: Went there to get my tooth extracted. Was quite nervous, but Dr. Eugene helped me feel comfortable and the procedure was smooth and painless. Really recommend.

title: Lai Dental Clinic (Black Diamond Invisalign Provider)
address: 2E(1st floor, 2E, Jalan SS 22/25, Ss 22, 47400 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Syairin
reviews.text: The dr here is so helpful. The staff also follow up with your post procedure. Did my wisdom tooth extraction here and guess what, it didnt pain at all! They really did a great job!

reviews.name: Annie Chin
reviews.text: Im satisfied with the treatment here. The dentist is gentle, caring and friendly.  Thank you Dr Ding for taking your time to explain in details my  dental problems , and showing me how to care for my teeth  😀 .

reviews.name: Edward Loh
reviews.text: l had a really good experience at this dental clinic. The filling was painless, and the doctor was professional, patient, and very nice. I felt comfortable the whole time.

reviews.name: Jeremy Wong
reviews.text:
I’ve done scaling, teeth aligners and wisdom tooth extraction here in 2025.

Dr Chew did the scaling and aligners, but she is no longer there. She was really good.

Dr Ding consulted for me and was very kind and knowledgeable. He explained the risks and cost involved.

I had Dr Lai to perform the Minor Oral Surgery to extract my impacted wisdom tooth. Yes, there is an X-ray to be done, but that is to rule out any possibility of nerve damage to the tooth.

Yes it costs money, but they are up front about the cost and I think it’s necessary to do these things. I was worried about nerve damage and post surgery recovery. But it was alright. The nurse Ms Neramala was professional in her conduct and also good with her follow up message and advice.

I recommend this clinic. It’s a private clinic, so it would cost money. But I believe that you get what you pay for. In my case, Dr Lai is experienced, so for major procedures I trust him.

reviews.name: Tan Hou
reviews.text:
Went in thinking I had a tooth infection. The doctor couldn’t figure out what was wrong and just sent me for an MRI—felt like a total scam 🤬. The MRI cost RM 350, which is ridiculously expensive. In total, I ended up spending RM 500.
When I was ready to leave, the receptionist was nowhere to be found. After looking around, I found her just playing on her phone 📱. So lazy and unprofessional! I asked to change the name on my bill for insurance purposes, and she flat out said “cannot” with zero helpfulness 🤦‍♂️.
Terrible experience. Don’t waste your time or money here!

reviews.name: Daniel Cheng
reviews.text: Price is very expensive for just filling 2 teeth (RM600). Double the price than my family clinic. First time came here and felt disappointed 😮Most expensive charges ever in my life

reviews.name: Melanie Galviso
reviews.text: My Clinic for almost 7yrs i just went for my scaling,polishing and filing today everything was smoothly done by Dr.Chew Thank you for taking care of me during the process Highly Recommended and Staff is all good since day 1☺️🙏🏻

title: Lee and Mak Dental Clinic
address: 11, First Floor, Jalan SS 2/55, SS 2, 47300 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: s u n n y l e o w
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience with Dr. Lee at Lee & Mak Dental Clinic, SS2. She’s very professional, gentle, and friendly — really makes you feel at ease. The clinic has a nice heritage feel, simple and homely, which adds to the comfort. You can tell Dr. Lee truly cares about her patients and takes the time to explain everything clearly. Highly recommended, especially if you want a caring and experienced dentist who treats you like family!

reviews.name: Tina N
reviews.text:
I have been coming to see Dr Lee a few times and she is a gentle, soft-spoken doctor who is both conscientious and meticulous in what she does. I recommend her dentistry services.

Dr Mak no longer is the dentist in this clinic.

reviews.name: Over Comp
reviews.text:
Dr mak did a teeth check about 10 years ago for my son. Dr Mak just pulled out 2 of my son's teeth and injected a HUGE needle into his jaw. He cried and panicked but the doctor didn't have sympathy at all and continued. My son's whole half of his face turned num and can't even tell if his breathing. He continued to cry but the nurse just told us to leave because there is another kid and he will scare the other kid because of the crying.

If I could give negative stars I would.
Worse dentist ever. Period.

reviews.name: Wee Suan sunway
reviews.text:
Dr Lee did a good job, was considerate that I am very sensitive to pain. Explained each step carefully and clearly. I'm sure she would have wanted to grumble about my poor dental hygiene, but she didn't :). She just patiently did what she needed to do.
Clinic condition is not modern, but it is overall very clean.

title: T.K. Yap Dental Surgery

reviews.name: Jamie Chin
reviews.text: Favourite dentist. I have been going to Dr Yap since I was a teenager so it’s been over 15 years now. Won’t ever go to a different dentist. Dr. Yap is patient, gentle, professional and honest.

reviews.name: Chris Fredericks
reviews.text: Dr Yap is very careful and patient and explains when he is attending to your teeth.

reviews.name: Kan Myocho
reviews.text:
Dr Yap is the greatest dentist I have ever encountered in my life of dental agony. His warm smile penetrates through his mask and his miracle hands are soft enough to calm the worry of pain but strong enough to get the tough dental job done. I have been visiting Dr Yap for years now, and no other dentistry no matter how ATAS and premium is their waiting lounge is, nothing beats this traditional simplicity. Honest man with no expensive treatment to convince, he is just there to bring you back the joy of smile minus the painful process.

Rating in all generality:
Professionalism - 10/10
Affordability - 6/10
Pain level - 3/10

Thanks Dr. Yap!

reviews.name: Gaik Kim Chew
reviews.text: Overcame my dentist fears at this place. 😀

reviews.name: Weng Sarco
reviews.text: I'm from Philippines 🇵🇭 My husband recommend this place to me. singing Dr Yap praises and... HE IS A REALLY GOOD DOCTOR!!! All the staff is very friendly and the place is also comfortable 👍🏼 anyway, Dr Yap really does his work very thoroughly and brief everything so i understand it. Plus point is he try to make you comfortable with everything and tried to make it hurt less during the procedure. I don't feel any pain even my tooth so big and long. Thanks no more pain 😊

reviews.name: Jennifer Yan
reviews.text: Dr Yap is an honest and competent individual . He walked me through each step of the root canal procedure. He has a simple clinic, but all you need is a reliable doctor. From now on ,he will be my permanent dentist

reviews.name: leonard leo
reviews.text: Very responsive and easy to deal with. Doctor was patient, explained all issues and was very accommodating.

reviews.name: 5525 Gunner
reviews.text: Hands down, the best dentist that I have ever sought treatment for. Very gentle and calming. He made me feel very comfortable and assured. Thank God for Dr Julius. I highly recommend him. 👍

reviews.name: shansa / cami perera
reviews.text: Dr Julius is communicative & reassuring during tooth extraction and good at explaining issues and giving advice - he and the nurses were patient and attentive. Also willing to answer all my questions, thank you!

reviews.name: Gaik Ling Ang
reviews.text: Best dentist I have ever been to. Dr & staff very polite. No pain at all. Dr is very gentle. Highly highly recommended. Thumbs up 10 stars. My brother, mother & daughter comes to this dentist. Tq  Dr Julius & Tharshini. My appt was today @ 4pm. 🥰🥰🥰

reviews.name: Erik Teh
reviews.text:
A friend recommended this clinic, because he had good experience. And I'm happy to HIGHLY recommend them as well since I had a FANTASTIC experience in February this year

I had a wisdom tooth extraction

Pre-extraction: Good experience via whatsapp conversation. responsive and helpful

During the visit: The dentist, Dr Julius, has fantastic bed-side manners. Very gentle, friendly and always reassuring throughout.
Even when administering anaesthetics, he kept asking if I feel pain and when I did, he slowed down the anaesthetics so I'd feel less pain. Very commendable!

The actual extraction was very smooth. Again, throughout the whole process, he kept checking if I"m ok. It really helps allay anxiety and fear during the process

Post-extraction: I actually had minimal pain and fast recovery. Was able to take solid food after 1 day!

Dr Julius also made the effort to text me to ask if I was ok post-extraction. Great follow-up

Pricing: Very affordable.

Premise: Comfy and clean! No frills but does the job. Very good experience

Pls do support him. We need good professional affordable dentists like him to be around.

reviews.name: Joloving it
reviews.text: Pleasant visit with this dentist. Professional , gentle & experienced doctor , he will not push you to root canal unless needed.  Definitely return for the next visit. Recommended!

reviews.name: PY F
reviews.text: 非常好而且专业的医生，patient and professional doctor 👍疗程中医生会关注你是否不适需要舒缓一下，而不会硬硬不停顿地洗牙，护士也很专业，价格合理，态度良好👍

reviews.text:
Have called up and ask about the price for x Ray, doc didn't disclose the price and ask me to walk in.

Because  my wife tooth have pain for 3days so I suggest to do xray .

Xray cost rm180 for one side tooth, I don't know how advance is the xray , it didn't show any problem

The journey  is start, Dr advice to wash the gum, suspected  infection  and cost rm280

Change the filling for one of the tooth that she mention decayRm150

Painfull  doest not stop
I went back next day,  change another two teeth filling for rm270
Problem also didn't solve

Conclusion,  I use about 1k and it didn't  solve my problem

reviews.text:
Called them to ask the price for filling and scaling treatments. The person on the phone answered, "We do not disclose our price through the phone. Bye."
Then she hung up. Extremely rude. No one should trust anyone who'd allow a staff to talk like that near their teeth.

title: Origin Dental Clinic
address: No. 181, Jalan SS2/24, SS 2, 47300 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Wei Lin Yeat
reviews.text:
I had a root canal treatment done by Dr. Yeap and had a very positive experience throughout the entire process. Dr. Yeap was attentive, gentle, and took the time to explain every step clearly. The treatment was carried out with great attention to detail, and I always felt I was in good hands.

The dental room was warm, comfortable, and welcoming, creating a relaxing environment that did not feel intimidating at all. The overall atmosphere of the clinic was pleasant and reassuring.

I would also like to commend Ms. Lee at the reception. She was friendly, responsive, and helpful from appointment booking to follow-up enquiries.

Thank you to Dr. Yeap, Ms. Lee, and the team for providing such excellent care and service!

Highly recommended for anyone looking for professional, gentle, and patient-centred dental care!

reviews.name: Ng Giok Ting
reviews.text: The staff are friendly, Dr. Yeap is so professional and gentle, and the whole process was smooth and comfortable. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Shi Qi Ng
reviews.text: My dad had visited a few well-experienced dentists, including a specialist, but they couldn't find the cause of his tooth pain when biting on the left side. He was then introduced to Dr Yeap by his friend. Dr Yeap checked his teeth very meticulously and explained some of the few causes to him in detail. After his treatment, my dad's pain has improved substantially after the first visit. One week later, he went for a follow up visit where Dr Yeap did further treatment and immediately after that, the pain which had lasted for the past few months had completely disappeared. Please do not have the wrong perception that a young dentist is not as good as more elderly dentists who have many more years of experiences. Thank you very much Dr Yeap and his team. I would strongly recommend anyone to visit Dr Yeap should they have any issue with their teeth :)

reviews.name: khin seng lam
reviews.text: Dr. Yeap is a highly experienced dentist who demonstrated great professionalism while performing my wisdom tooth extraction.

reviews.name: Angela Hoi
reviews.text: Went for a tooth scaling session and honestly, it was much better than I expected. The process was quite quick and not as painful as I imagined. My teeth felt super clean and smooth right after, like a fresh reset. Definitely worth it for maintaining oral hygiene. Would recommend doing it regularly!

reviews.name: Kenji Kkl
reviews.text:
I had an excellent experience at Origin Dental Clinic. The doctor is incredibly knowledgeable and truly passionate about their work. What impressed me the most was the patience in explaining every detail clearly, making sure I fully understood my condition and treatment options.
You can really feel the sincerity and dedication — not just treating, but genuinely caring for patients. The whole experience was comfortable and reassuring.
Highly recommended to anyone looking for a professional and trustworthy dental clinic!

reviews.name: Rachel Low
reviews.text: Dr Yeap is patient and soft spoken, makes customers comfortable. Always makes sure that my retainers are good, and has 3D scanning which makes it easier to get any revisions ( if you’re working/studying abroad)

I highly recommend Dr. Binny and his team for anyone seeking dental services (for both Japanese and locals!). They are not only professional in terms of their works, but also go above and beyond to ensure that I feel at ease during my visits. I had a filling done there, and it was executed beautifully. I must highlight Dr. Binny's attention to detail is remarkable and exceptionally skilled. Very minimal pain and always care for patients.

Other than that, they also offer Invisalign treatment, different plans for individuals are available ~ I’m looking forward to the progress!

Other info: Parking lot for visitors are sufficient! Nice and clean environment :)

reviews.text: I've been bringing my son to see Dr. Lin at Landmark Dental since 2020, and we've always had a great experience. Dr. Lin is extremely patient and always takes the time to clearly explain my child's dental condition and the procedures needed. My son feels calm and happy during every visit. I truly have peace of mind knowing Dr. Lin is taking care of my child’s dental health. Highly recommended for kids and anyone looking for professional and caring dental services!

reviews.name: Queen Yee
reviews.text: Dr Lin Cze-Yin. Best orthodontist. Professional, subject matter of expert, patient centric.

reviews.name: amy tam
reviews.text: I just completed my dental implants in Landmark Dental Care, Ara Damansara. I didn't expect the whole process to be so  comfortable. There was no pain at all in every visit. The implant teeth feel like real teeth. The procedure was done by Dr Lin and she is very gentle and nice and so professional. I am so happy and 100% satisfied with my implant teeth and finally I have replaced my missing teeth and no need to wear denture.

reviews.name: Carmen Chan
reviews.text: Had my scaling, filling & braces treatment done with Dr Lin! Even though I’m staying quite far away but always wanting to reach out to Dr Lin who is always friendly & patient in explaining the procedures. A very warm & gentle dentist.

reviews.name: Nicholas Teoh
reviews.text: I recently visited for a dental check-up due to pain in my wisdom tooth area. Dr. Choo was very professional and patient, taking the time to clearly explain what was going on and what my options were. This helped me feel more informed and less confused. During the scaling process, she was attentive and caring, regularly checking to make sure I was comfortable. I appreciated her thoughtful approach and would recommend her to anyone looking for thorough and considerate dental care.

street: E-1-2A Jalan PJU 1A/20G Dataran Ara Damansara

title: Smileworks Dental Clinic
address: A-2-05 Oasis Ara Damansara, Jalan PJU 1A/7A, 47301 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Hakim Omar
reviews.text: Highly recommended. Dr Ikhwan is very knowledgeable, knows how handle kids and ensuring that it will be a good experience for their visits

reviews.name: Nurasyikin Othman
reviews.text: Dr ikhwan and his assistant superb friendly. I was there to do minor operation for my wisdom tooth, the process was smooth,, thank you so much dr and his assistance (sorry forgot her name),,

reviews.name: Tatiana Žiaková
reviews.text: I needed an emergency retainer removal, as it got damged and was hurting my mouth and my tongue. I was super grateful to find Smileworks and especially Dr. Nor Ikhwan Abu Bakar DDS, as he and also his assistant were both super friendly and professional. They comunicated super fast, with clarity, they provided all useful information and the dental service was clean, fast and very proffesional. They also got me an appointment the very same day I contacted them. Not to mention that I have paid 2x less than  I woluld in other clinics which are trying to enrich by travel insurance patients. I could not recommend them more! If i was living in KL this would definitely be my forever dentist. Thank you for everything!

reviews.name: It's me Nurul
reviews.text: Doktor sangat baik & anak2 suka dtg sini

reviews.name: Iman Hamouch
reviews.text:
Hi I just wanted to say thank you again to the clinic and Dr.
I came on holiday and I was worried to see a dentist here but I'm happy I came to you guys 💕
Thank you for helping me and relieving my pain 💛💛💛
Now I can enjoy the rest of my holiday 💛🧡💛🧡

reviews.name: columbus
reviews.text: amazing seevice would go again

title: D.S Lim Dental Clinic

reviews.name: Daniel Ooi
reviews.text: Did a major filling, no issues after the filling. The dentist was patient in explaining how to improve flossing. Also went back for follow-up due to sensitivity with the tooth - free of charge. But call ahead to book an appointment.

reviews.name: Mahendran Ramayah
reviews.text: Good service …

reviews.name: yin lee
reviews.text: 前来安装2支门牙。林医生非常的专业精神。安装后也感觉舒服。林医生非常细心及耐心的调整。也给于一些基本的假牙护理知识，收益良多。助理非常的友善，敬业乐业。价钱公道，地点适中，会以华语沟通。给于赞扬，值得推荐您前来

reviews.name: Rachel Liow
reviews.text: Dr Lim made my new retainers and it fit perfectly! He was efficient and thorough in scaling my teeth too.

reviews.name: KAPT. LIM
reviews.text: Have obtained treatment here three or four times. Dr. Lim is a dedicated, patient, skillful dental surgeon who provides good advice and evaluation to his patients. In addition, he is very thorough and careful, whether in doing filling, scaling, or tooth extraction. Strongly recommended to residents and office workers  in the vicinity of Ara Damansara, Subang Jaya, Tropicana and Saujana.

reviews.name: Nur Syahidah
reviews.text: Filling process was ok, just that scaling process need to be improve. The splashing water on my face quite a lot compare to other place I went. And the assistant put the suction below our tongue and its a bit painful . On top of that, the scaling not done thoroughly (usually all teeth, but this one not) which agreed by my husband too. But the price is affordable 👍🏻 p/s: Hope the doctor explain more about our teeth / gums and better have physical paper and mark down which teeth got problem

title: Ara Dental Studio
address: B-2-13A, Block B, Oasis Ara Damansara, No.2,Jalan PJU1A/7A, Ara Damansara, 47301 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

reviews.name: Ehsan Omid
reviews.text: Even after moving to Canada, I still miss the level of care and professionalism I received from Dr. Jason. He always took the time to explain every dental procedure clearly before starting, and that meant a lot to me. I believe helping patients truly understand what's being done is a sign of respect, and Dr. Jason does exactly that. He's skilled, patient, honest, and genuinely cares about his patients' comfort. Finding a dentist like him is not easy, and I highly recommend Ara Dental Studio to anyone looking for exceptional dental care.

reviews.name: Andrea Sim
reviews.text: I did my first ever extraction with Dr Jason, and even though it was an impacted wisdom tooth extraction that is considered a minor surgery, Dr Jason made it as smooth and manageable as possible. Thanks to his patient and thorough explanations about each step of the extraction, I could face it without fear, and thanks to his experience and expertise, the extraction was over in just 30 mins. Thank you so much!

reviews.name: Sollehan Shafura Zainuddin
reviews.text: the best dentist.

reviews.name: Grace Lee
reviews.text:
Highly recommended dental studio!

Dr. Jason is so good in handling kids, he even manage to make my son laughed, as he was feeling tense. He explained everything thoroughly and with great care.

Few days leading to the dental visit, we did prepared and showed him some videos and explained the sounds that he is going to hear, assuring him that it’s just sounds, no pain at all.

Oh! It was nothing like that! The online videos are too scary!

Dr. Jason scrapped out the cavity and managed to clean it with just minimal sound (way softer than your electric toothbrush sound). The whole thing was so quick and my son managed to cooperate throughout.

So, go to Dr. Jason! I imagined all the worst case scenario but Dr. Jason and my son, both proved me wrong! My son was so ready to open his mouth wide and big before the dentist ask to. Dr. Jason surely has a funny bone. Fand for reference, my brave boy is turning 4 soon.

reviews.name: Pang Philip
reviews.text:
Best dentists in town!
Big shout out to both Dr Yong and Dr Jason.
Known Dr Yong for many years. Very knowledgeable, meticulous, and gentle with her hands.
Just had a moderate complexity minor oral surgery to remove my wisdom tooth with Dr Jason yesterday and I was gobbling down rice with Korean chicken today!
Dr Jason was marvellous, thorough review, took time to explain and answer any queries. The procedures were quick, and skill-fully performed.
Most importantly, it wasn’t painful; even when he was injecting the LA!
Thanks!

reviews.name: Jeremy Timmer
reviews.text: Great treatment and friendly staff!

reviews.name: Nicky
reviews.text:
I've been here at least 4 times and I always recommended to anyone of my friends when they ask for a recommendation.

If you want to get a wisdom tooth extraction, the doctor will patiently explain the procedures to you. They are super friendly and very nice people.

It's not a scary dental experience at all and the price won't be expensive as other places.

reviews.name: Cherryblossom 89
reviews.text: I had such a great experience at Dentalyst A.D clinic. The doctor is very professional and gentle, and all the staff are friendly and caring. The service is truly superb from start to finish. They made me feel comfortable and well taken care of. Highly recommended!!

reviews.name: Chocolate vanila
reviews.text: Best doc, best staff, fast respond..wsp tanye ape2 pon semua respond..paling best boleh pakai bracess dalam masa sehari jimat mase tak perlu ulang alik banyk kali, antara klinik yg murah setakat ni dengan depo 299 je.. pls sape yang nak pakai bracess recomeded sangt..

reviews.name: Ameer Ilhan
reviews.text: staff so nice and friendly…. dr amirah really soft spoken and skilled dentist i feel no pain at all highly recommended dentist clinic at klang valley .

reviews.name: BEHRUZ Ma'rufjonov
reviews.text: I’m on my second day of root canal treatment and everything has been very smooth. The doctor is really good — gentle, caring and explains everything clearly. The procedure was not painful at all and the staff are also very friendly. I’m really satisfied with their service and care!

reviews.name: Farah
reviews.text: I had a wonderful 5 years braces journey under supervision from Dr Nabeehah. She’s really good and know her job very well 🫶🏻 Always explain in details on every monthly routine checkup. Clinic has a great ambiance too, so you won’t feel scared waiting for your turn 🥶 All the staff are great and helpful too. Thank you Dentalyst for your excellent services. I definitely recommend this dental clinic for dental treatment🌷🌷

reviews.name: Amalin Jazlina
reviews.text:
Alhamdulillah , Dr and Dsa ramah semua .
Walaupun dtg dgn nervessssss tapi diorang tenangkan saya 🤣🤣

Klinik gigi trusted dan mesra pelanggan 🤍

reviews.name: Alif Mukhriz
reviews.text: Sey sey DC KHENG 😁 I’ve started to feel brave enough to smile showing my teeth 😂

reviews.text:
Dr Koh was very gentle when handling my case and really appreciate how she explained about my teeth/ gum condition.

Also, thank you to Ms Jasbir and Pn Shafina for your assistance. 😁

reviews.name: Daphne Chea
reviews.text: Thank you Dr. Davina, Dr. Justin, and the nurses for the excellent care! Had my root canal done here — smooth, professional, and reassuring every step of the way. Special thanks to Dr. Davina for the patient and clear explanations that put me at ease. Now I can go eat crab!

reviews.name: Touhidul Islam
reviews.text: Everyone very helpful, good experience.

reviews.name: Teng Lim Cheah
reviews.text: Went to DrMeiLuk Dental Clinic @ Ara Damansara for the 1st time yesterday after reading some of the reviews. Dr Yennie, I truly appreciate your gentle approach, patience, thoroughness and clear explanations throughout the procedure. Highly recommended! Hana, thank you for being so attentive, friendly and supportive throughout the treatment. Your care and presence made a BIG difference. Keep up the good work

reviews.name: Ms Looi
reviews.text:
Feels like being home with a caring family dentist. Dr Yennie and team are very good.
Perfect before and after (follow-up) services on whatsapp too.
Perfectly clean and hygienic for a perfectionist as I.
Floors are so clean, you can walk around bare foot :)

reviews.name: stephenie lim
reviews.text: My 1st time visiting ara damansara branch. Environment clean and staff friendly. Thanks Dr Yennie for your patience and advice clearly abt my conditions.

reviews.name: Cheryl Yong
reviews.text: Had a great experience here. Dr Yennie Tan was detailed in her explanation and the booking process was easy. Thank you.

reviews.name: Jia Yee Chin
reviews.text: The experience was pleasant. I like how detailed and patient the dentist explained to me. It doesnt feel rush like other clinic. Would suggest them to have water dispenser ror waiting patients.

reviews.name: Little Khalsa Club
reviews.text: The customer service is good and gentle. My favourite is Dr Tan..very understanding, gentle and best experienced. You must try. It's really good. It been 8 years now I am going here.

reviews.name: Simgim Lim
reviews.text: The receptionist was warm and accommodating, and the dentist took the time to give a thorough, detailed explanation throughout my son’s dental check-up and filling, which made the whole experience very reassuring.
